content: Horla Salvador Aigis Jenkins could be alright
hmm ok, thanks! could you let me know why that's nice? just so i could also understand since i'm nuba xD

So Horla is one of the best supports in the game even with no investment towards dupes since her stance buffs are really strong on top of everything else she provides, 

Salvador is a solid tank that provides increased healing which is great for the early game on top of also providing weakness and vulnerability to make enemies do less dmg and take more dmg

Aigis is one of the best units in the game and shes free. She applies vuln, does increased dmg to enemies with it, and has an exalt which freezes enemies for a turn making her a very clutch oh shit button 

Jenkins is a support that does solid dmg in aoe that allows her to be used as a dps early on in the game and furhter on if you like and invest into her
so this setup lets aigis help your burst down tougher enemies with her exalt, salvador keep you alive and horla providing a lot of strong buffs to enable Jenkins to be able to clear

Step 1- Put Glottony and the Vitality R wheel  (lets you remove 3 symptoms at rest areas)

Step 2- Use up ALL the red pools before the final encounter to increase you max HP as high as you can and only THEN go to the rest areas to sell all the symptoms, addionally, there's an event in the exploration that gives you Sigils for the cost of a symptom. It is repeatable and but has diminishing returns. Don't be afraid to spam it, even including the red pools you'll be able to sell most of them.

Step 3- fight and win

Using this tech should grand you more than 5k HP and 0 symptoms, and all of the event's Sigils (more than 100 I think, not including what you get from selling the symptoms)

Using Caro or Divine Aequor is recommended since Furnace and Devour shield scale on Max HP

Additionally, you may use the brown R Wheel that gives you cursed relics on shops (they're broken) and the one that gives you 3 free shop refreshes for a bit of additional power

Otherwise it's just bring your strongest team
